response.step_by_step_log: 1. Video analysis identified two distinct performances. 2. Performance 1: 'Run Back 'Round', performed by HoloLive English -Promise-, metadata found on-screen. 3. Performance 2: 'Slap by Step', performed by HoloLive Indonesia 2nd Generation, metadata found on-screen. 4. Searched for official lyrics of both songs using composers/artists (Steph/Vell for 1; Ryosuke Goto/Muhammad Iqbal for 2). 5. Parsed lyrics into JSON format.
response.global_summary: This video features two performances from a Hololive concert. The first song is 'Run Back 'Round' performed by HoloLive English -Promise- (IRyS, Ouro Kronii, and Hakos Baelz). The second part of the video features a transition with talk followed by the song 'Slap by Step' performed by HoloLive Indonesia 2nd Generation (Pavolia Reine, Kureiji Ollie, and Anya Melfissa).

scenes.description: The video begins with a performance of 'Run Back 'Round' by the HoloLive English -Promise- group, featuring IRyS, Ouro Kronii, and Hakos Baelz on stage.
scenes.performer_in_video: HoloLive English -Promise- (IRyS, Ouro Kronii, and Hakos Baelz)

scenes.description: The performers from the first song finish and leave the stage. There is a brief transition and audience cheering before the next performers arrive.
The performers from HoloLive Indonesia 2nd Generation (Pavolia Reine, Kureiji Ollie, and Anya Melfissa) take the stage to perform 'Slap by Step'.
scenes.performer_in_video: HoloLive Indonesia 2nd Generation (Pavolia Reine, Kureiji Ollie, and Anya Melfissa)
